name: hongmeng-editor
description: A local-first Markdown editor and Codex plugin skill for configurable writing workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Open and manage a local Markdown editing workspace from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Four Seasons Markdown Editor provides a local browser-based Markdown editor plus Codex-facing instructions, without bundled private content or hard-coded machine paths.
defaultPrompt: Open my Four Seasons Markdown editor workspace.
Create a direct editor link for this Markdown file.
Check the editor setup and privacy boundary.
